title: Because You Loved Me
album: The Best Of Celine Dion & David Foster
why_this_song: Because You Loved Me by Celine Dion (1996) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 12 times; first heard in: "You were my voice when I couldn't speak"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "You gave me faith 'cause you believed"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I'm everything I am because you loved me"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I'm everything I am because you loved me"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "You saw the best there was in me"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Lifted me up when I couldn't reach
You gave me faith 'cause you believed
I'm everything I am because you loved me
(You were my strength when I was weak)
(You were my voice when I couldn't speak)

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "couldn't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "couldn't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "gave" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "gave" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: For all those times you stood by me
You said no star was out of reach
You were my voice when I couldn't speak

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Because You Loved Me" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Because You Loved Me" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Because You Loved Me", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Because You Loved Me", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Because You Loved Me" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Because You Loved Me" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
